## Benchmark changes (if applicable)
If this PR changes model behavior or accuracy, link the reproduction script/dataset per `CONTRIBUTING.md`. New numbers should be appended to `ml/benchmarks/BENCHMARKS.md`, not overwriting previous entries.

## Schema changes (if applicable)
If this touches the forensic record schema or the OCSF/Wazuh alert mapping, call out backwards-compatibility impact explicitly.
